problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Combining Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
